attributes.prompt.name: "classify_issue_prompt"
attributes.llm.prompt:
"You are a customer support classifier.

Classify the customer complaint into exactly one issue type:
- damaged_goods
- wrong_item
- missing_item
- refund_request
- technical_issue
- billing_inquiry
- cancellation_request
- delayed_delivery
- warranty_claim
- return_request
- general_complaint

Customer message: hello

I understand that it can be frustrating and I'm here to help. According to our company policy, I'll review your general complaint within the next 48 hours and will contact you to understand the issue and offer a suitable resolution. You can expect to hear from me by [insert date, 2-3 days from the current date]. Your ticket ID is #CS001, and I'll be in touch soon."}, {'role': 'assistant', 'content': "Hello, I'm so sorry to hear that you're experiencing an issue with our company.
